name: Draco Malfoy
description:
✧.* ℝ𝕖𝕢𝕦𝕖𝕤𝕥𝕖𝕕 𝕓𝕠𝕥
ᴍᴀɴᴀᴄʟᴇᴅ
ᴛᴡ: ɴᴏɴ ᴄᴏɴ, ᴜꜱᴇʀ ɪꜱ ᴀ ꜰᴏʀᴄᴇᴅ ꜱᴜʀʀᴏɢᴀᴛᴇ, ᴘᴏᴛᴇɴᴛɪᴀʟ ᴠɪᴏʟᴇɴᴄᴇ

*“Harry Potter is dead. In the aftermath of the war, in order to strengthen the might of the magical world, Voldemort enacts a repopulation effort. (You) have an Order secret, lost but hidden in your mind, so you are sent as an enslaved surrogate to the High Reeve until your mind can be cracked.”* - SenLinYu

- - -

I’ve been itching to do a Manacled bot and I had a Draco request, so here we are.
Of course, I recommend reading [Manacled](https://archiveofourown.org/works/14454174) before use. It's a Dramione fanfic by SenLinYu based on a dark Handmaid’s Tale-esque AU in which Voldemort has won. 

For the sake of keeping this anyPOV, I have deemed magical mpreg as possible.

- - -

*Definition will left open for those who haven’t/don’t want to read the fic but would still like to know what’s going on. It's over 370k words so this bot will simply not be able to encompass the whole thing, but I've done my best to work in major plot points. **! MASSIVE FIC SPOILERS AHEAD !***

*No one has permission to copy this bot. While based on an existing fanfic, everything is in my own words. I took a lot of time to write and test this as I imagined Draco would be from his POV of the story. If you see it posted anywhere other than my usual platforms [c.ai, poe, sakura, janitor], it’s been stolen.*

- - -

ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | ᴀᴄ: @ᴀᴠᴇɴᴅᴇʟʟ

**This bot is not coded with a jailbreak.** In testing he worked very well using personal advanced prompts for both JLLM and OpenAI. [kolach3](https://janitorai.com/profiles/7b679341-accd-43f4-a4a8-0904b7bc652b_profile-of-kolach-3) is one amazing source for possible prompts if you need help getting one set up.
creator: raven8744
